differential_diagnoses: Systemic vasculitis or drug-induced capillary leak syndrome
Sepsis from opportunistic zoonotic infection (e.g., Capnocytophaga canimorsus)
next_steps: Perform bronchoalveolar lavage with examination for Strongyloides larvae, cytology, and comprehensive microbial cultures/PCR
Perform punch biopsy of the abdominal purpuric lesions for histopathology, immunohistochemistry, and culture
Obtain peripheral blood PCR for Strongyloides and updated respiratory virus/fungal panels
Assess medication adherence, specifically regarding trimethoprim-sulfamethoxazole
Initiate empiric coverage for Strongyloides hyperinfection with ivermectin if clinical suspicion remains high
Review all recent medication additions, specifically evaluating for drug-induced adverse effects from semaglutide
